spec.name: A Dead End
spec.description: The dust-covered hallway has come to an abrupt end at a stony, featureless wall. Here and there are signs of the recent passage of others in the dust.

south.description: The dusty hall continues to the south.

down.description: The floor is quite dusty, and made of stone. You see some cracks.

extra_descs.description: The cracks look like you might be able to pull away some pieces of the floor, perhaps even fit your body through the space you make.
